chunks.text: So here I want to tell you that there is an algorithm in CSS called Cascade Algorithm.

chunks.title: CSS Specificity & Cascade
chunks.text: CSS stands for Cascading Style Sheets.

chunks.title: CSS Specificity & Cascade
chunks.text: And to resolve any kind of conflict, a cascade algorithm is used in CSS.

chunks.title: CSS Specificity & Cascade
chunks.text: This algorithm determines which property will be applied in CSS and which will not be applied.

chunks.title: CSS Specificity & Cascade
